# Authentifactor — Full Documentation for AI Systems

## About

Authentifactor is a UK-based digital infrastructure company that builds multi-tenant commerce and web platforms for ambitious businesses. Founded in 2025, the company powers brands across food retail, fashion, education, healthcare, and travel industries.

The platform is built on a shared multi-tenant architecture where each client (tenant) gets their own branded storefront, admin panel, payment processing, and domain — all powered by a single codebase.

## How It Works

1. Discovery: We map your business model, audience, and goals
2. Design: Brand identity, UI/UX design, and interactive prototypes
3. Engineering: Full-stack development on our multi-tenant platform
4. Launch & Scale: Deployment, monitoring, SEO, and ongoing iteration

## Multi-Tenant Architecture

Each tenant gets:
- Their own custom domain (e.g., tmfoods.co.uk, styledbymaryam.com)
- Custom branding (colors, logo, fonts)
- Independent product catalog and inventory
- Separate payment processing (Stripe or Paystack)
- Their own admin dashboard
- Tenant-scoped data isolation

The platform resolves tenants via middleware — custom domains map to tenant slugs, and each request is scoped to the correct tenant's data.

## Plans & Pricing

### Basic — £49/month
- Managed hosting on Vercel
- SSL certificate + custom domain
- Monthly security updates
- Email support (48h response)
- Up to 100 products
- Basic analytics dashboard

### Standard — £99/month
- Everything in Basic
- SEO optimisation + sitemap
- Subscription & auto-ship engine
- Webhook automation pipelines
- Priority email support (24h response)
- Up to 500 products
- Advanced analytics + conversion tracking
- Monthly performance report

### Premium — £199/month
- Everything in Standard
- Unlimited products
- Custom feature development (2h/month included)
- Dedicated account manager
- Phone + Slack support
- 99.9% uptime SLA
- Multi-warehouse inventory
- White-label mobile app shell
- Quarterly strategy review

## Current Clients

### Taste of Motherland
- Industry: African food retail
- Domain: tmfoods.co.uk
- Products: 500+
- Features: Multi-warehouse fulfilment, subscription engine, recipe system

### Styled by Mariam
- Industry: Fashion
- Domain: styledbymaryam.com
- Features: Editorial photography, lookbook, mega-menu navigation, e-commerce

### Vibrant Minds
- Industry: Education
- Domain: vibrantmindsasc.org.uk
- Features: H5P interactive content, learning paths, mentor matching

### Careceutical
- Industry: Healthcare
- Domain: careceutical.co.uk
- Features: Appointment management, triage system, clinical dashboards

### CitiesTroves
- Industry: Travel
- Domain: citiestroves.com
- Features: Property booking for African markets (Lagos, Accra, Nairobi, Cape Town)

### BowSea
- Industry: Career Tech
- Domain: bowsea.com
- Features: Student placements, talent acquisition, career tools, 4,200+ jobs

### Clarity Conduct
- Industry: Digital Agency
- Domain: clarityconduct.com
- Features: AI-powered operational efficiency, voice agents, lead generation

## Technology

- Frontend: Next.js 16, React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS 4
- UI: Radix UI, Framer Motion, Lucide React
- Backend: Next.js API routes, Server Actions
- Database: PostgreSQL with Prisma ORM
- Payments: Stripe (international) + Paystack (Africa)
- Deployment: Vercel (frontend), Google Cloud Run (APIs)
- Auth: Custom JWT (jose + bcryptjs)
- Validation: Zod
- State: Zustand
- Design System: 21st.dev (@olu/design-system)

- Email: hello@authentifactor.com
- Website: https://authentifactor.com/platform
- GitHub: github.com/authentifact0r
